arts.ttl: Champions League permutations: Possible outcomes for Arsenal, Liverpool, Man City on matchday seven
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at the possible permutations of this week's Champions League action, including possible fates for Arsenal, Manchester City and Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals Liverpool forward's injury blow with star set to be ruled out for 'weeks' ahead of Champions League clash against Lille
arts.sum: Slot confirmed that the player will be sidelined on Tuesday and he is expected to miss several weeks.

arts.ttl: Ibrahima Konate reveals he HAS received a new contract offer from Liverpool - as he opens up on playing through the pain barrier
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Ibrahima Konate admits he still has a contract issue to resolve but is demonstrating his commitment to the club by playing through pain.

arts.ttl: Liverpool recall transfer stance on Ben Doak confirmed after two rejected bids
arts.sum: Liverpool have rejected two bids from Premier League sides for Ben Doak this month

arts.ttl: Curtis Jones issues perfect reply after Mohamed Salah and Eden Hazard controversy
arts.sum: Curtis Jones has doubled down on his comments about Liverpool team-mate Mohamed Salah and Eden Hazard

arts.ttl: I have just witnessed new Liverpool leader emerge after remarkable candid discussion
arts.sum: Analysis from Anfield as Ibrahima Konate reveals all ahead of Liverpool's Champions League visit from Lille on Tuesday

arts.ttl: 'You can't do that' - Man Utd boss Ruben Amorim slammed by Liverpool legend for comments
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim tore into his Manchester United side after they slumped to defeat against Brighton at Old Trafford and he has now been issued with a scathing response ahead of the midweek clash with Rangers

arts.ttl: Liverpool XI vs Lille: Predicted lineup, confirmed team news, injury latest for Champions League
arts.sum: Arne Slot could reward Darwin Nunez after his late heroics at the weekend

arts.ttl: Arne Slot responds to Thomas Frank's claim about his Liverpool side
arts.sum: Brentford boss Thomas Frank had some high praise for Liverpool at the weekend after their late, late show in the Premier League - now Kop boss Arne Slot has responded, looking to keep his stars on task

arts.ttl: Ibrahima Konate on knee injury, playing through the pain barrier and his Liverpool 'sacrifice'
arts.sum: Ibrahima Konate returned from a knee injury to play for Liverpool after a number of weeks out
